|epname=Dream a Little Dream
|desc={{p|Gothitelle}} is Caitlin's only known Pokémon. By using Gothitelle's psychic abilities, Caitlin was able to communicate with the Gym Leaders kidnapped by Team Plasma to learn of their condition. Later, Caitlin used Gothitelle to connect Black's mind to the other Gym Leaders so they would be able to relay a message to him.

Gothitelle's known moves are {{m|Telekinesis}} and {{m|Psyshock}}, and its Ability is {{a|Frisk}}.}}
